case_title: CAMILA CERVANTES VS. JOSE LUIS FRANCO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-23-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE OCT-11-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-11-2011 CONTINUED TO OCT-11-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE LUIS FRANCO, AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST ALL DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
